case_title: CURSE, INC. VS. THE UPPER DECK COMPANY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-09-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-09-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
